title: gnaphalium calicinum
intro: Gnaphalium calicinum, also known as Calico Gnaphalium, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Gnaphalium calicinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in various herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
